name: harness-kit
description: Jacksen's personal docs-driven closed-loop dev workflow: a global /harness command (deterministic loop entry) + a db-guard delete-safety hook, plus a project bootstrapper that stamps a local harness-engineering orchestrator (five-doc spec gate, LESSONS.md learning loop, enforcement hooks) + domain skills into each repo, plus scaffold / coding-standards / git-commit / grill-me skills.
